name: Ursarctic Slider
name_jp: ベアルクティ・スライダー
desc: Target 1 of your "Ursarctic" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, but it cannot attack, also destroy it during the End Phase. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except monsters with a Level. You can only activate 1 "Ursarctic Slider" per turn.
eff: Target 1 of your "Ursarctic" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, but it cannot attack, also destroy it during the End Phase. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except monsters with a Level. You can only activate 1 "Ursarctic Slider" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Level specific monsters
